name: @leapunion/agentic-runtrace
description: Agentic 思维链·行动链 Run Trace ChatBot — versioned, brand-agnostic UI + engine core (in-process). The ONLY project code is a small Adapter (tools/data). Extracted from the agentic-runtrace-chatbot skill per ADR-0004 (A→B: scaffold-copy → versioned package · kills drift).
//: SKELETON (Phase B step 1 · ADR-0004). The component/engine source moves here from the skill templates/ in B-2; see MANIFEST.md for the file map. Subpath exports split CLIENT UI from the SERVER engine so a project's client bundle never pulls Node fs/path.

scripts.build: tsup src/index.ts src/engine/index.ts src/chat-store/index.ts --format esm --dts --clean --external react --external react-dom --external @iconify/react
